findings.description: `BasicDbConnection` is mentioned in the source's ConnectionFactory interface description ('BasicDbConnectionを入れ替える場合') but is absent from s2 hints. An AI searching for 'BasicDbConnection' would not be routed to s2 even though it is referenced there.
findings.source_evidence: 「:ref:`実装クラス<db-connectionFactory-sub-label>` で生成されるBasicDbConnectionを入れ替える場合には、本インタフェースの実装クラスを追加する必要がある。」

findings.description: `BasicSqlStatementExceptionFactory` is a PascalCase class name that appears in the XML configuration block of s5 but is absent from the hints. An AI searching for this class would not be routed to the DataSource configuration example.
findings.source_evidence: <component class="nablarch.core.db.statement.exception.BasicSqlStatementExceptionFactory"> in the 設定ファイル例 section

findings.description: `initSqlList` is a configuration property of `JdbcTransactionFactory` present in the XML configuration block of s5 but absent from hints. Per V4 rules, property names from content should be in hints.
